species: we characterized a chloroplast acetyltransferase in Solanum lycopersicum, SlGNAT2...
tissue: expression analysis in tissue and organs showed that GNAT2 was mainly expressed in leaves
cell_type: transient expression of GNAT2-GFP in tomato leaf protoplasts
sample_source: we examined the photosynthetic complexes of thylakoid membranes in different lines using Blue-native (BN)-PAGE.
age: 2-week-old WT, OX6, gnat2 - 1, and gnat2 - 2 plants were treated with fluctuating light
cell_line: seeds of tomato cultivar Micro Tom obtained from Ball Horticultural Company
strain: seeds of tomato cultivar Ailsa Craig (AC) from our laboratory were used.
